strength.label: Horsepower Spectrum (HP)
strength.desc: Tracks DOTS-adjusted output. Higher = more peak HP per kg of chassis.

explosivePower.label: Torque Spectrum (TRQ)
explosivePower.desc: Tracks launch torque and kinetic discharge. Higher = sharper throttle response off the line.

cardio.label: Stint Spectrum (STINT)
cardio.desc: Tracks aerobic ceiling and heat management. Higher = longer stints at redline.

muscleMass.label: Exterior Spectrum (CHSS)
muscleMass.desc: Tracks SMM relative to height. Higher = fuller exterior profile and structural load capacity.

bodyFat.label: Displacement Spectrum (P2W)
bodyFat.desc: Tracks FFMI from profile and body fat. Higher = larger powerplant and stronger power-to-weight.

gripStrength.label: Traction Spectrum (GRIP)
gripStrength.desc: Tracks terminal neural grip output. Higher = stronger mechanical grip and limit control.

G_PLATFORM.title: Serial Code: Iron Chassis
G_PLATFORM.summary: Strength leads all six axes. Extreme rigidity—in the {{genderGroup}} lineup, heavy-platform class; gravity reads as light-load cruise.

HIGH_OUTPUT.title: Serial Code: High-Output Afterburn
HIGH_OUTPUT.summary: Explosive power leads. Razor throttle—launch-control neural fire, redline in minimum distance.

ENDURANCE_PROTO.title: Serial Code: Endurance Prototype
ENDURANCE_PROTO.summary: Cardio leads all six axes. Elite thermal management—24-hour Le Mans stability, long-range dominance.

WIDE_BODY.title: Serial Code: Wide-Body Architecture
WIDE_BODY.summary: Muscle mass leads. Serious downforce frame—dense fiber base, immovable heavyweight in any arena.

AERO_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Aero Optimization
AERO_SPEC.summary: FFMI leads all six axes. Track-record displacement and power-to-weight—minimal drag, every gram tuned.

MR_SPEC.title: Serial Code: Mid-Engine Balance
MR_SPEC.summary: Grip leads all six axes. Surgical steering, fierce bite—mid-engine neural control through the apex.

GT_CRUISER.title: Serial Code: Global Grand Tourer
GT_CRUISER.summary: All six axes balanced—full-spectrum unlocked. Flagship elegance and ferocity, zero power gaps.
